title: Handy Magi System
wikitext:
[]: Handy Magi System             Quote Post by ImaGhostbuster » Wed Jun 23, 2010 11:01 am Hey all, first post :p been on these forums reading for like 2 years so about time i started posting! anyway on topic i bought this a while ago just wondering if anyone has ever used it? ive kept mine sealed so any info would be cool as theres not much floating around about it.

[]:             Quote Post by Dark doom » Wed Jun 23, 2010 11:11 am WHAT ZEH HELL IZ ZAT CRAP!

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Wed Jun 23, 2010 11:25 am It seems kind of small for such a powerful governing body. I guess that's what she said, though.

[]:             Quote Post by ImaGhostbuster » Wed Jun 23, 2010 11:34 am i believe u ask it questions and it says yes no etc like a magic 8 ball :p

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Wed Jun 23, 2010 12:40 pm Bigger pic. Be careful with Casper, he (or she?) is a crafty bastard.

[]:             Quote Post by giuliano » Wed Jun 23, 2010 4:32 pm Found one on eBay, the description even has a video so you can see it in action :P http://cgi.ebay.co.uk/Evangelion-Handy-Magi-System-decision-meachine-/180468301150?cmd=ViewItem&pt=LH_DefaultDomain_0&hash=item2a04bfbd5e
